creator: dohzono@gmail.com
text:
"install" copies gperf.info into /usr/local/*share*/info/gperf.info,
"install-info" seems to refer from /usr/local/info/gperf.info.

> ===>   Generating temporary packing list
> ===>  Checking if devel/gperf already installed
> cd lib; /usr/bin/make install
> cd src; /usr/bin/make install
> /bin/sh ./../mkinstalldirs /usr/local/bin
> install  -s -o root -g wheel -m 555 gperf /usr/local/bin/gperf
> cd tests; /usr/bin/make install
> cd doc; /usr/bin/make install
> /bin/sh ./../mkinstalldirs /usr/local/share/info
> mkdir /usr/local/share/info
> install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 ./gperf.info /usr/local/share/info/gperf.info
> /bin/sh ./../mkinstalldirs /usr/local/share/man/man1
> install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 ./gperf.1 /usr/local/share/man/man1/gperf.1
> /bin/sh ./../mkinstalldirs /usr/local/share/doc/
> install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 ./gperf.html /usr/local/share/doc//gperf.html
> install-info --quiet /usr/local/info/gperf.info /usr/local/info/dir
> install-info: No such file or directory for /usr/local/info/gperf.info
> *** Error code 1
> 
> Stop in /usr/ports/devel/gperf.
> *** Error code 1
